rules.title: Schema declarations
rules.help: Declare resource and event schema plus action input_schema and output_schema URIs.

rules.title: Action risk labels
rules.help: Use one of the eight core labels or a non-empty ASCII URI valid under RFC 3986 generic syntax; runtimes remain responsible for verifying collision resistance, support, and conservative mapping.

rules.title: Risk explanation UI hints
rules.help: Use a closed, bounded, canonically ordered risk_explanation with restricted language tags, control-free inert text, and exact parent-effect coverage.

rules.title: Idempotency closure
rules.help: State-changing and persisted proposal actions require fixed-point normalization, input hashing, and input_schema_hash.

rules.title: Scope consistency
rules.help: Declare each referenced scope exactly once; control events omit scope and non-control events require one.
